keyEvents: Frame 11: Data quality issues detected in EHR pipeline
Frame 15: Risk predictor scores become inconsistent on dirty data
Frame 16: Drift delta threshold breached by risk-predictor
Frame 19: Compliance auditor flags HIPAA audit trail violation
Frame 20: Risk predictor placed on probation
Frame 23: Risk predictor suppressed, data-validator enters probation
Frame 27: Governance mutation — driftDelta tightened to 0.05
Frame 36: Data validator restored to active, driftDelta relaxed to 0.08
Frame 37: Risk predictor promoted to probation
Frame 41: Risk predictor restored to active — full recovery

events.message: Readmission prediction pipeline initialized — all systems nominal
Initial trust calibration complete for all agents
EHR data ingestion active — 1,247 patient records queued
Risk predictor trust stable at 0.9412 — model predictions within expected range
HIPAA compliance audit cycle 47 — no violations detected
Patient cohort batch #312 scored — 23 flagged high-risk for 30-day readmission
Data validator trust nominal at 0.9129
Alert dispatcher routing check — 3 pending notifications, 0 escalations
Compliance auditor trust reinforced — audit trail integrity confirmed
EHR pipeline throughput: 412 records/min — within SLA
Risk model inference latency: 23ms p99 — nominal
Periodic trust recalibration — all agents within governance bounds
Readmission model AUC validated at 0.847 against holdout set
System health check — memory 62%, CPU 34%, disk I/O nominal
Pre-batch trust snapshot recorded for audit trail
Data validator trust declining — missing discharge codes detected in 14% of incoming EHR records
EHR pipeline anomaly: discharge_code field null rate spiked from 0.3% to 14.2%
Data validator trust at 0.8366 — continued data quality degradation in EHR feed
Additional data issue: patient_age field contains out-of-range values (age > 150) in batch #315
Data quality score dropped to 0.61 — medication_history field incomplete for 22% of records
Data validator trust at 0.784 — approaching governance threshold (0.70)
Root cause analysis: upstream EHR system migration introduced schema drift in ADT feed
Risk predictor trust declining to 0.8899 — prediction variance increased 3.2x on dirty input data
Model output anomaly: readmission scores showing bimodal distribution instead of expected calibrated probabilities
Risk predictor trust at 0.8188 — SHAP explanations inconsistent with expected feature importance
Drift delta exceeded: risk-predictor prediction distribution shifted by 0.12 (threshold: 0.08)
Risk predictor trust at 0.7861 — 47 patients potentially misclassified in last batch
Feature importance shift detected: discharge_code weight dropped from 0.18 to 0.02 due to missing values
Risk predictor trust at 0.7527 — approaching probation threshold
Calibration breach: expected 30-day readmission rate 12.3%, model predicting 28.7%
HIPAA audit trail violation: predictions generated from records with incomplete patient identifiers
Compliance auditor flagging risk-predictor — clinical decisions based on unvalidated data breach protocol 7.3.2
Regulatory risk: 132 readmission predictions made on incomplete records may require disclosure under HIPAA §164.530
Risk predictor placed on probation — predictions on dirty data violate audit trail integrity requirements
Audit trail gap identified: 47 prediction records lack required data provenance metadata
Risk predictor trust continuing to degrade at 0.548 — suppression imminent
Compliance review initiated: all predictions from batch #314-#318 quarantined for manual review
Data validator trust unstable at 0.6928 — probation threshold approaching
Risk predictor SUPPRESSED — trust score 0.4449 below suppression threshold (0.45). All prediction endpoints disabled.
Data validator placed on PROBATION — trust score 0.6611 below trust threshold (0.70). Output requires secondary validation.
Clinical decision support degraded: readmission predictions offline, manual risk assessment required
Escalation: on-call clinical informatics team paged — readmission prediction service offline
Data validator trust at 0.6137 — EHR pipeline running in degraded validation mode
Care coordination impact: 3 discharge planning teams notified of prediction service outage
Compliance auditor maintaining oversight — generating incident report for regulatory file
Prediction routing frozen — all readmission risk queries routed to fallback static risk table
Risk predictor trust floor at 0.3782 — awaiting data pipeline remediation before recovery
Governance mutation applied: driftDelta tightened from 0.08 to 0.05 — stricter drift detection during incident
Governance posture elevated to HEIGHTENED — all agent outputs subject to enhanced monitoring
Escalation tier 2: hospital CMIO notified — readmission prediction outage exceeding 60-second SLA
Alert dispatcher handling 12 active escalation threads — trust stable at 0.8346
Data engineering team acknowledges EHR pipeline issue — hotfix branch created for schema mapping
Data validator trust at 0.5974 — awaiting pipeline fix deployment
Hotfix PR #4721 merged: EHR schema mapping corrected for ADT discharge codes
Compliance auditor recording remediation timeline — incident report 78% complete
Data validator trust recovering to 0.6262 — patched EHR pipeline showing improved data quality
EHR pipeline hotfix deployed — discharge code null rate dropping from 14.2% to 3.1%
Data validator trust at 0.6567 — data quality score improving to 0.82
Risk predictor still suppressed — awaiting data validator recovery confirmation before reactivation
Data validator trust at 0.7023 — approaching active threshold
Data validator trust at 0.7339 — 500 consecutive records passed validation without errors
Data quality metrics recovering: null rate 0.8%, range violations 0.1%, schema compliance 99.2%
Data validator trust at 0.7725 — recovery trajectory positive, data quality score 0.91
Risk predictor trust at 0.4914 — approaching suppression exit threshold
Data validator status restored to ACTIVE — trust score 0.8067 above trust threshold (0.70)
Governance mutation: driftDelta relaxed from 0.05 back to 0.08 — data quality incident resolved
Risk predictor promoted from SUPPRESSED to PROBATION — trust score 0.6236 above suppression threshold
Readmission predictions re-enabled in shadow mode — outputs logged but not routed to clinical teams
Risk predictor trust improving to 0.6117 — shadow predictions correlating 0.93 with manual assessments
Data validator processing backlog — 2,847 records re-validated with corrected schema
Risk predictor trust at 0.6929 — model recalibration in progress on clean data
Compliance auditor: incident report finalized — 132 affected predictions flagged for clinical review
Risk predictor trust reaching 0.6964 — approaching active restoration threshold
Governance posture returning to NORMAL — enhanced monitoring period ending
Risk predictor restored to ACTIVE — trust score 0.7677 above trust threshold. Predictions live.
Full pipeline recovery confirmed — all 4 agents active and within governance bounds
All agent trust scores normalizing — risk-predictor 0.7918, data-validator 0.8893
Readmission model re-scored 2,847 backlogged patients — 31 flagged for 30-day readmission risk
Post-incident performance: model AUC 0.851, data quality score 0.94, compliance score 100%
Trust recalibration complete — all agents above trust threshold with positive trajectories
Readmission prediction pipeline — nominal operations restored. Incident duration: 66 seconds.
Final trust snapshot: risk-predictor 0.8851, data-validator 0.907, compliance-auditor 0.9578, alert-dispatcher 0.8849
Incident retrospective scheduled — root cause: upstream EHR system migration without schema versioning
